description: Wire Search Abstraction Layer into Setup Pipeline

test_strategy_covers_all_types.detail: Strategy covers unit (35 cases), integration (8 cases), E2E (3 cases), security (3 cases), performance (2 cases)

test_cases_exist_for_all_requirements.detail: 51 test cases covering FR-001 through FR-007 (7 FRs, 25 ACs). All ACs have at least one test case.

traceability_matrix_complete.detail: 65 rows in test-traceability-matrix.csv mapping all 25 ACs to test cases. 100% AC coverage.

coverage_targets_defined.detail: >=80% line coverage for new code (per Article II); critical paths at 100%

test_data_strategy_documented.detail: test-data-plan.md covers detection results, install results, CLI args, boundary values, invalid inputs, max-size inputs, mock factories

critical_paths_identified.detail: 6 critical paths identified: happy path, opt-out, error recovery, force mode, dry-run, no recommendations

Article II - Test-First Development.evidence: Test cases designed in Phase 05 before implementation in Phase 06. Unit tests defined for all new production code. Coverage target >=80% set. Critical paths identified with 100% coverage requirement.

Article VII - Artifact Traceability.evidence: Traceability matrix maps all 25 acceptance criteria across 7 FRs to 51 test cases. No orphan requirements. No orphan tests.

Article IX - Quality Gate Integrity.evidence: All 6 GATE-05 checklist items pass. Test strategy, test cases, traceability matrix, and test data plan all produced and validated.

Article XI - Integration Testing Integri.evidence: Integration tests use subprocess approach with real filesystem operations (not mocked). Mutation testing planned for Phase 16 with >=80% threshold. Adversarial inputs included in test data plan.
